text: At epoch 1 the value function sees advantage targets in the ±£300 range; value_loss_coeff=0.5 × MSE produces losses in the 10⁹–10¹² range.

locator.quote: gradient signal, so PPO's KL clip cannot pull the policy back.

text: One update in that regime pushes the policy to the don't-bet corner; abstention has zero gradient signal, so PPO's KL clip cannot pull the policy back.

locator.quote: Grad-norm clipping bounds magnitude but not direction — the

text: Grad-norm clipping bounds magnitude but not direction — the direction learned on that batch is still bet-less.
